'''Cor Mynus''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he was assigned to the planet [[Kirima (Kalinda system)|Kirima]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Den of Spies|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
